rulings.Case Title: GILBERT FORBES VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Soco West, Inc.¿S Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 19, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 4. Defendant Soco West, Inc.¿s motion for summary judgment and alternative motion for summary adjudication: Per the October 13 hearing, the court is just re-posting its initial tentative ruling: Soco West, Inc.¿s motion for summary judgment and alternative motion for summary adjudication are denied. Defendant failed to sustain its burden of production that plaintiff does not now possess and cannot reasonably obtain evidence that he was exposed to asbestos-containing products or materials attributable to defendant. By failing to demonstrate that it propounded contention discovery on plaintiff seeking all facts, witnesses and documents supporting plaintiff¿s contentions against it, and that plaintiff submitted factually devoid responses, defendant is precluded from successfully invoking the factually devoid prong of Aguilar. Defendant also failed to sustain its burden as to collateral estoppel. Since defendant did not attach responses to contention discovery with its moving papers, defendant did not demonstrate what plaintiff¿s claims are as to it and thus did not demonstrate that any of the collateral estoppel requirements have been met. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:45am in Dept. 503, not 9:30am in Dept. 220. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If a court reporter is needed, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM DUTY,ET AL VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION For Order To Consolidate Actions For All Purposes Including Trial
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 19, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion for order to consolidate actions for all purposes including trial is granted. No opposition filed. Cases numbered 274845 and 275851 are consolidated. Henceforth all papers shall be filed under the lead case no. 274845. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:45am in Dept. 503, not 9:30am in Dept. 220. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If a court reporter is needed, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. = (503/TLJ)
